phases.title: Control plane truth and runner safety
tasks: commit active-lane lock acquisition and release
make upstream replay ephemeral when a downstream lane does not land its own commit
synchronize runtime runner state with install, stop, error, and recovery paths
recover the stale active cycle before rematerializing autonomy
lock the go-live hardening PRD and plan into runtime state
exit_gates: runtime and runner state agree about service posture
only active lanes hold live locks

phases.title: Shared generic geometry closure
tasks: inspect the active product-family and systems-qa artifacts
fix shared lane geometry in kernel-owned code only
close /work/xr with zero critical and zero major diffs
exit_gates: responsive overflow remains zero on the current matrix
no XR-only bespoke layout hack exists

phases.title: Replication proof
tasks: replay the accepted kernel into /work/ft
verify XR and FT through integration
reject any kernel patch that does not generalize
exit_gates: XR and FT replay cleanly in integration

phases.title: Responsive matrix expansion
tasks: expand the target viewport matrix
rerun falsification on canonical and generic routes
capture viewport regressions as deterministic system learnings

phases.title: Supervised autonomy proof
tasks: reinstall the service
run a supervised C4 to C5 sequence
require clean settlement without manual queue repair
exit_gates: runner and runtime state remain consistent

phases.title: Guarded local autonomy proof
tasks: run guarded local autonomy inside repo boundaries
observe improvement-or-hold cycles
prove recovery under interruption or lane failure

phases.title: Press-go eligibility bundle
tasks: update runtime gates
update the press-go evidence bundle
keep press_go false until explicit authorization

stop_conditions: stale lock that cannot be recovered cleanly
press_go_rule: press_go remains false until A0-A6 are satisfied and explicit human authorization is recorded
